members.name: GetAvoidanceLayerValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member avoidance_layers] bitmask is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetNavigationMap
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of the navigation map for this NavigationObstacle node. This function returns always the map set on the NavigationObstacle node and not the map of the abstract obstacle on the NavigationServer. If the obstacle map is changed directly with the NavigationServer API the NavigationObstacle node will not be aware of the map change. Use [method set_navigation_map] to change the navigation map for the NavigationObstacle and also update the obstacle on the NavigationServer.

members.name: GetRid
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of this obstacle on the [NavigationServer3D].

members.name: SetAvoidanceLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetAvoidanceLayerValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member avoidance_layers] bitmask, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetNavigationMap
members.summary: Sets the [RID] of the navigation map this NavigationObstacle node should use and also updates the [code]obstacle[/code] on the NavigationServer.

members.name: AffectNavigationMesh
members.summary: If enabled and parsed in a navigation mesh baking process the obstacle will discard source geometry inside its [member vertices] and [member height] defined shape.

members.name: AvoidanceEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code] the obstacle affects avoidance using agents.

members.name: AvoidanceLayers
members.summary: A bitfield determining the avoidance layers for this obstacle. Agents with a matching bit on the their avoidance mask will avoid this obstacle.

members.name: CarveNavigationMesh
members.summary: If enabled the obstacle vertices will carve into the baked navigation mesh with the shape unaffected by additional offsets (e.g. agent radius). It will still be affected by further postprocessing of the baking process, like edge and polygon simplification. Requires [member affect_navigation_mesh] to be enabled.

members.name: Height
members.summary: Sets the obstacle height used in 2D avoidance. 2D avoidance using agent's ignore obstacles that are below or above them.

members.name: Radius
members.summary: Sets the avoidance radius for the obstacle.

members.name: Use3dAvoidance
members.summary: If [code]true[/code] the obstacle affects 3D avoidance using agent's with obstacle [member radius]. If [code]false[/code] the obstacle affects 2D avoidance using agent's with both obstacle [member vertices] as well as obstacle [member radius].

members.name: Velocity
members.summary: Sets the wanted velocity for the obstacle so other agent's can better predict the obstacle if it is moved with a velocity regularly (every frame) instead of warped to a new position. Does only affect avoidance for the obstacles [member radius]. Does nothing for the obstacles static vertices.

members.name: Vertices
members.summary: The outline vertices of the obstacle. If the vertices are winded in clockwise order agents will be pushed in by the obstacle, else they will be pushed out. Outlines can not be crossed or overlap. Should the vertices using obstacle be warped to a new position agent's can not predict this movement and may get trapped inside the obstacle.
